segments.text: You think packaging is just trash, but in Korea, it's genius. And I will show you how they solve these three problems that you face every single day. We all know how you always waste the last part.
Korean solved this with a special silicon balloon inside. As you use it, the balloon squeezes every last bit out.
You get zero waste in a spotless bottle.
This is genius, but the next one can save your look. I'm talking about a pimple. You pick it and it just gets red and leaves a scar. The Korean solution,
the hydrocoloid patch. It's tiny, almost invisible sticker. You put it on your spot, it protects it, keeps it clean,
and pulls out all the gunk overnight. No mess, no picking. Simple and practical.
If you're still watching, there is a bonus design for you. Bananas come in a packaging with green, yellow bananas together, so that you eat the ripe
bananas and by the last day, the green bananas are also perfectly ripe. So, no waste and perfect timing. So convenient.
